---
title: "Research for CULT Committee – The European Union's Approach to Multilingualism in its Own Communication Policy"
author: "Mendez, C., Gazzola, M., Clement-Wilz, L., Triga, V., Mendez, F., Djouvas, C., Charamboulos, A., and Bachtler, J."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "European Parliament (CULT Committee)"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/report.png
---
